---
title: "01 — R Basics"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, comment = "#>")
```

## Vectors

```{r}
x <- c(1, 2, 3, 4, 5)
x * 2
length(x)
class(x)
```

```{r}
# Sequences
1:10
seq(0, 1, by = 0.25)
rep(c(1, 2), times = 3)
rep(c(1, 2), each = 3)
```

```{r}
# Named vectors
v <- c(a = 1, b = 2, c = 3)
v["b"]
names(v)
```

## Subsetting

```{r}
x <- c(10, 20, 30, 40, 50)
x[2] # by index (1-based)
x[c(1, 3)] # multiple indices
x[-2] # all except index 2
x[x > 25] # logical condition
```

```{r}
# Named subsetting
v <- c(a = 1, b = 2, c = 3)
v[c("a", "c")]
```

## Missing values (NA)

```{r}
x <- c(1, NA, 3, NA, 5)
is.na(x)
sum(is.na(x)) # count NAs
x[!is.na(x)] # remove NAs
mean(x, na.rm = TRUE) # ignore NAs in calculations
```

## Logic

```{r}
TRUE & FALSE # AND (vectorised)
TRUE | FALSE # OR  (vectorised)
!TRUE # NOT
TRUE && FALSE # AND (scalar, short-circuit)
TRUE || FALSE # OR  (scalar, short-circuit)
xor(TRUE, FALSE)
```

```{r}
x <- 5
x > 3 & x < 10
x == 5
x != 4
x %in% c(3, 4, 5, 6)
```

## Data types

```{r}
class(42L) # integer
class(3.14) # numeric
class("hello") # character
class(TRUE) # logical
class(as.Date("2024-01-01")) # Date
```

```{r}
# Type coercion
as.integer(3.9) # 3 (truncates)
as.numeric("3.14")
as.character(42)
as.logical(0) # FALSE; 1 → TRUE
```

## Matrices and data frames

```{r}
m <- matrix(1:6, nrow = 2, ncol = 3)
m
dim(m)
nrow(m)
ncol(m)
m[1, 2] # row 1, col 2
m[1, ] # entire row 1
m[, 2] # entire col 2
```

```{r}
df <- data.frame(name = c("Alice", "Bob"), age = c(25, 30), score = c(88.5, 92.0))
df
df$age
df[df$age > 26, ]
nrow(df)
ncol(df)
dim(df)
names(df)
str(df)
summary(df)
```

## Lists

```{r}
lst <- list(x = 1:3, label = "test", flag = TRUE)
lst$x
lst[["label"]]
length(lst)
```

## Workspace

```{r eval=FALSE}
getwd() # current working directory
setwd("path/") # change working directory
ls() # list objects in environment
rm(x) # remove object
rm(list = ls()) # clear everything
```
